raw_text: Severe food shortage in Dharavi slum area affecting over 200 families. Multiple families have reported not eating for over 24 hours. Children and elderly most affected.
Water supply contaminated in Dharavi sector 5. Residents complaining of stomach illness. Tap water has foul smell and discoloration.
Healthcare facility in Kurla West severely understaffed. Patients waiting over 6 hours for basic treatment. No medicines available for common ailments.
Multiple families in Govandi area living in structurally damaged housing. Monsoon approaching and roofs are leaking badly. Risk of collapse.
School in Malad East closed due to structural issues. 120 students have no alternative. Parents requesting temporary education facility.
Safety concern in Bandra East - broken street lights creating dangerous conditions at night. Multiple theft incidents reported in the area.
Medical camp urgently needed in Dharavi - increasing cases of dengue fever reported. 3 children hospitalized this week. Stagnant water everywhere.
Food distribution needed in Andheri East slum pockets. Daily wage workers lost income due to construction site closure. 50 families affected.
Clean drinking water crisis in Kurla East. Municipal water tanker has not come in 5 days. People buying expensive bottled water they cannot afford.
Children in Mankhurd not attending school due to lack of transportation. Nearest school is 4km away. Parents cannot afford auto fare.
Housing repair needed after fire in Dharavi 13th compound. 8 families displaced. Currently sleeping on streets. No temporary shelter provided.
Mental health support needed in Govandi. Drug abuse among youth increasing. Families requesting counseling services and rehabilitation support.
Food insecurity in Malad West fishing community. Fishing ban period started - no income for 2 months. 70 families need food support.
Waterlogging in Bandra East causing health hazards. Mosquito breeding increasing. Children getting skin infections from contaminated water.
Elderly residents in Chembur Old Age Home running out of medications. Diabetes and BP medicines finished. No budget for new supply.
Educational materials needed for community learning center in Dharavi. 60 students have no textbooks for current semester.
Street children in Kurla West need shelter and food. At least 15 children sleeping under bridge near railway station.
Garbage collection stopped in Govandi for 10 days. Waste piling up near residential areas. Strong smell and rats visible everywhere.
Community health clinic in Andheri West needs volunteer doctors. Current doctor left. 200 patients per week have no medical access.
Flooding in low-lying areas of Malad East. 30 homes waterlogged. Families need temporary relocation and cleaning supplies.
Food bank storage in Sion running low. Only 3 days of supply remaining. Serves 100 families daily in surrounding slum areas.
Tailoring skills training requested by women's self-help group in Dharavi. 25 women want to learn for livelihood. Need volunteer trainers.
Water pipeline burst in Vikhroli East. Entire neighborhood without water for 3 days. BMC not responding to complaints.
Senior citizens in Bhandup need regular health checkups. Many have untreated chronic conditions. Requesting volunteer medical professionals.
Fire safety concern in Mulund slum area. Closely packed hutments with exposed electrical wiring. Previous fire incidents in area.
Nutrition program needed for pregnant women in Kurla. Many showing signs of anemia and malnutrition. 20 women in critical need.
Drainage blocked in Dharavi sector 7. Sewage flooding into homes. Children playing near contaminated water. Disease outbreak risk high.
After-school tutoring needed in Govandi. Students falling behind due to lack of study support at home. 35 students requesting help.
Domestic violence cases increasing in Andheri East community. Women requesting safe space and legal aid support from volunteers.
Roof repair needed for community hall in Chembur used as shelter during monsoon. Currently leaking badly. 50 families depend on it.
Vaccination drive needed in Dharavi. Many children under 5 not vaccinated. Parents unaware of importance. Need Hindi-speaking health volunteers.
Free meal distribution needed near Santacruz station. Migrant workers arriving daily with no food or shelter arrangements.
Water scarcity in Borivali East tribal settlement. Nearest water source 2km away. Women carrying water on head daily.
Health awareness camp needed in Dadar slum area. TB cases suspected but not tested. Community distrusts hospitals.
Unsafe building in Worli koliwada. Cracks appearing in multiple walls. 12 families at risk. Need structural assessment volunteers.
Computer literacy classes requested by youth in Dharavi. Want to learn basic Excel and online job applications. 40 students interested.
Women's safety patrol needed in Jogeshwari East. Multiple eve-teasing incidents near public toilet. Women afraid to go after dark.
Food distribution to elderly living alone in Powai area. 15 senior citizens identified who cook for themselves with difficulty.
Contaminated bore well in Ghatkopar West. Residents using it anyway due to no alternative. Lab test showed unsafe bacteria levels.
Mental health counseling needed for flood victims in Thane. Post-traumatic stress reported. Children having nightmares and anxiety.
Temporary shelters needed for evicted families in Dharavi. 10 families including children and elderly displaced by demolition drive.
English speaking classes for migrants in Colaba. Want to access better job opportunities. 20 adults requesting volunteer teachers.
Street children at Juhu beach need food and basic education. Approximately 25 children identified living without adult supervision.
Community kitchen in Kandivali West running out of funds. Feeds 150 people daily. Need food donations and cooking volunteers.
Rainwater harvesting setup needed in Dharavi to supplement water supply. Community willing to participate. Need technical volunteer guidance.
Free eye checkup camp needed in Wadala. Many elderly residents with untreated cataracts. 30 people identified needing immediate attention.
Housing repair for 5 families in Mahim affected by recent building crack. Families afraid to stay but have nowhere else to go.
After-school STEM program requested for fishing community children in Versova. Students interested in science but no exposure to labs.
Child labor instances reported in Dharavi leather workshop area. 8 children aged 10-14 found working. Need social worker intervention.
Emergency food supply needed for families affected by factory closure in Kurla East. 90 workers lost jobs suddenly. No savings.
